content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by integrating a HyDE RAG module that generates hypothetical long-term action trajectories before retrieving relevant stored memory traces, replacing traditional similarity-based memory retrieval for curiosity-driven agents. This modified memory architecture lets agents proactively retrieve rarely accessed but high-potential exploratory memories that would be ignored by standard nearest-neighbor retrieval.
